title: ManaMetalMod Tweaks
description: Optimize performance and in-development content for ManaMetalMd
body:
ManaMetalMod Tweaks (M3-T) works for optimize and testing something we will be developing in the future. Everythings control by configs.
| Target                        | Name of Config          | Description                       | Def Value | Other        |
| ----------------------------- | ----------------------- | --------------------------------- | --------- | ------------ |
| AutoCrystal-Crafting Global   | UseNewCraftingSystem    | Global for target. *(1)           | true      | NaN          |
| AutoCrystal-Crafting Cache    | CraftingCacheLiveRounds | The life-cycle for cache          | 20        | *(2)         |
| AutoCrystal-Crafting DeepScan | ShouldDeepScanRecipes   | Find the ingredients' Ingredients | false     | Still in dev |
| Sorting Cabinets/Core Sorting | UseNewSortingCabinet    | Overwrite for all.*(3)            | true      | NaN          |

*1 : The cache pool mechanism is overridden and a global cache pool is provided to reduce the burden on the server, while the Tag matching mechanism replaces any type of unsafe match in the mineral dictionary.

*2 : A value to control whether the cache needs to be deprecated. When a player add or changed a AutoCrystal-Crafting's recipe, it will make a cache for this recipe and record to the pool, or mark value to 1. then every cache recipe in pool will mark once. If over this config value, it will remove from cache pool.

*3 : Officially designated maintenance, but not yet merged. As follows:
- scan every 5 seconds.
- Each scan examines the items in the core of the category in its entirety, rather than just one item classification at a time.
- Scans caches.
- Batch matching, which will be faster.
